metadata.title: Geo Judo Club de Genève - Judo School in Geneva for Children
metadata.description: Join Geo Judo Club de Genève for world-class judo training. Our school has been a trusted institution in Geneva for over 15 years, offering professional training for children aged 2-15.

hero.title1: Study the art of judo in

componentOne.text: Our judo school, founded 15 years ago in Geneva, has become a significant place for young athletes. With passion and professionalism, we nurture our students, teaching them discipline, strength, and unity through the art of judo. Join our legacy today!

componentTwo.text2: Guaranteed results, sports activities, and a friendly atmosphere
componentTwo.text4: Guaranteed results, sports activities, and a friendly atmosphere
componentTwo.text6: Development through friendliness, sports activities, and discipline
componentTwo.text8: In the past year, our students participated in numerous competitions and deservedly won gold, silver, and bronze medals!

componentThree.text1: Giorgi Kurtanidze, an experienced judo instructor from Georgia, stands out with over 20 years of experience in sports. For the past 15 years, he has been teaching in Geneva, helping children aged 2-15 develop judo techniques and values such as respect and teamwork. Giorgi's dedication and professionalism have made him a respected figure in the local community.
componentThree.text2: The knowledge and experience accumulated over 15 years is the greatest asset of our school.

metadata.title: Upcoming Judo Events at Geo Judo Club de Genève
metadata.description: Explore the latest and upcoming judo events at Geo Judo Club de Genève. Stay up-to-date with our competitions and training events.

metadata.title: Contact Geo Judo Club de Genève
metadata.description: Get in touch with Geo Judo Club de Genève for any inquiries or registration questions. We're here to help!

metadata.title: Register for Geo Judo Club de Genève
metadata.description: Sign up for judo classes at Geo Judo Club de Genève and start your journey in the world of judo.

contactForm.comfirmation: We will contact you back, as soon as possible
